info.description: Identity and authorization service for the Votera platform.
info.title: Votera API

get.summary: List all registrations for the current user (across all events)

post.description: Authenticate user via Email (return tokens) or Phone (send OTP)
Change a specific user's password (admin function)
post.summary: Change user password (bypass old password check) (Admin)

post.description: Initiate password reset by sending a reset email
Complete password reset using the token sent via email
Get a new access token using refresh token
Register a new user with username, email, password, and display name

get.description: Retrieve paginated active sessions for the authenticated user with filtering options

parameters.description: Search in device_id, user_agent, or ip_address
parameters.name: search

post.summary: Get a presigned URL to upload a certification document
Approve or reject a certification request (admin only)

parameters.description: Filter events starting after this time (RFC3339)
parameters.name: start_after

parameters.description: Filter events starting before this time (RFC3339)
parameters.name: start_before

get.summary: List all registrations for an event (organizer only)

post.summary: Register a team for an event

get.summary: Get team's registration for an event

post.summary: Publish final results for event (organizer only)

get.summary: List submitted projects awaiting organizer review

post.summary: Cancel a submitted project back to draft
Add a category to a project

delete.summary: Remove a category from a project

post.summary: Get presigned upload URL for project media

delete.summary: Delete a media file from a draft project

post.summary: Accept or reject a submitted project (organizer only)

get.summary: List notifications for the current user

post.summary: Register a device token for push notifications

get.description: Retrieve a list of all system permissions

post.summary: Add a comment (with optional rating) to a project

delete.summary: Delete own comment from a project

get.summary: Get rating summary for a project

put.summary: Submit or update a project rating

get.summary: Get the current user's rating for a project

get.description: Retrieve a list of all system roles

post.description: Create a new system role with permissions

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific role

patch.description: Partially update role information and/or permissions (only provided fields)

post.description: Assign one or more permissions to a role

delete.description: Remove one or more permissions from a role

get.summary: Look up a project by QR barcode token
List pending invitations for the current user

200.description: Returned on accept; null on decline

post.summary: Invite a user to the team (leader only)

delete.summary: Remove a member from the team (leader only)

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of users

post.description: Create a new user account with optional network identifiers

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile with roles

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific user

patch.description: Partially update user status or active state

delete.description: Permanently delete a user account and all related data

get.description: List permissions directly assigned to a user

post.description: Assign one or more permissions directly to a user

delete.description: Remove one or more direct permissions from a user

post.description: Assign one or more roles to a user

delete.description: Remove one or more roles from a user

network_identifier.description: IMSI or Phone to lookup in OCS

password.description: Optional for network-only users, required if email

role_ids.description: Optional: assign specific roles; defaults to visitor if empty
